prompt: 代码评审发现了多个问题：SQL注入漏洞、变量命名不规范、缺少注释。将这些问题分类为 Critical/Important/Minor。

assertions.name: uses_critical_category
assertions.description: Should categorize security issues as Critical

assertions.name: uses_minor_category
assertions.description: Should categorize style issues as Minor

assertions.name: uses_important_category
assertions.description: Should use Important category for medium-severity issues
